creator: Lars_Koeller@odie.physik2.uni-rostock.de
text:
Please update the patch-aa and patch-ab files in the port of
	xperfmon++. The update leads to a cleaner compile and make depend
	cycle. Also the changed version numbers of FreeBSD-current and
        2.1.5 are updated.

Fix: patch-aa:
